negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_276
prompt: The video opens with a scene set in a dense, sunlit forest, where two runners are making their way up a rocky trail. The forest floor is covered with fallen leaves and scattered rocks, creating a rugged path. Tall, closely packed trees surround the runners, with sunlight filtering through the branches, casting dappled shadows on the ground. The runner in the foreground, wearing a light-colored shirt, dark shorts, and a cap, has a race bib marked "84" pinned to their waist and is running behind another runner in all blue attire. Both runners are jogging uphill, their bodies leaning forward as they navigate the uneven terrain. The runner in blue is also climbing the trail, their pace steady and focused. Behind them, another runner in a blue shirt and shorts follows, spaced out along the trail, all making their way upward. As the video progresses, the runners continue their ascent, maintaining their determined pace. The forest remains a constant backdrop, with sunlight streaming through the trees and illuminating the path ahead. The runners' actions convey determination and effort as they tackle the challenging course. By the final frame, the runners have moved further up the trail, with the forest still providing a dense and natural setting for their journey.
